items.sentence: Ashwin acted like he had a bottomless stomach when he ate his third slice of pizza.
The ceaseless noise of the alarm made everyone cover their ears.
Ashwin cleverly hid his snacks so no one else could find them.
She curiously peeked inside the box to see what was making the noise.
Ashwin has a daily routine of checking the fridge for snacks.
The robot spoke in an emotionless voice, even when telling a joke.
The dog was faithful and followed Ashwin everywhere he went.
Frankly, Ashwin thought the homework was harder than expected.
Ideally, Ashwin would finish his homework before playing games.
The teacher was merciful and gave extra time on the test.
Ashwin was particularly excited about pizza day at school.
It was risky to climb the tall tree without help.
Ashwin studied sufficiently, so he felt ready for the test.
It was thoughtful of Ashwin to share his snack with a friend.
Ashwin gave a woeful look when he realized his dessert was gone.
I expect Ashwin to finish his homework before watching TV.
I suspect Ashwin ate the last cookie, even though he says he didn’t.
Ashwin drew a picture of a dragon breathing fire.
The pitcher poured lemonade into everyone’s cups.
